parameters.query:
INSERT INTO app.country_religions (country_iso3, religion_name, percentage, year)
SELECT c.iso_alpha3, $2, $3, extract(year from current_date)
FROM app.countries c
WHERE LOWER(c.name) = LOWER($1)
   OR LOWER(c.name) = LOWER($1 || ' (country)')
   OR (c.iso_alpha2 = 'KR' AND $1 = 'South Korea')
   OR (c.iso_alpha2 = 'CZ' AND $1 = 'Czech Republic')
ON CONFLICT (country_iso3, religion_name, year) 
DO UPDATE SET percentage = EXCLUDED.percentage;
